Off Calendar May-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Marianna Klebanov, Esq., for Plaintiff/Moving party Wells Fargo Bank
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Wells Frago Bank, N.A.'s Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions, and Demand For Inspection; and Request For Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. Having been served by mail, the first day the motion could be heard would have been May 15, 2006. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant Ellen Tsang moving party in propria persona
Anne T. H. Wong for plaintiff and opposing party: Wells Fargo Bank

HEARING HELD and Defendant's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, request for production of documents, and request for admissions is Granted in part and Denied in part. Plaintiff ordered to supplement response to interrogatory 50.2 withing 10 days. The motion is denied as to the remaining interrogatories and request for admissions. Plaintiff to make original documents available for inspection by March 21, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2005 Set For Trial On Jun-19-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-31-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Continued To Jan-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -
CROSS DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOC DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT-OVERRULED AS TO NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION CAUSE OF ACTION, 10 DAYS TO FILE ANSWER; SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO 1) BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY, 2) COVENANT GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING; 3) CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD; 4) PRODUCT LIABILITY (302/RQ/HE). Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
